name: UI & Rendering
description: The viewer component, graph operations, and Cytoscape rendering pipeline.

tours.title: How the Graph Renders
tours.description: From JSON to pixels: the rendering pipeline.

stops.title: The Viewer Component
stops.narrative: The [Viewer](node:viewer) is the central Halogen component. It manages all state: selected node, hover, search, tutorials, and depth controls.

stops.title: Decoding Graph Data
stops.narrative: [Graph.Decode](node:graph-decode) parses JSON into typed PureScript records, producing the [Graph.Types](node:graph-types) structures.

stops.title: Cytoscape FFI
stops.narrative: The [FFI wrapper](node:ffi-cytoscape) is a thin JS interop layer around [Cytoscape.js](node:cytoscape-js). No business logic — just rendering calls.
